//: Single source of truth shared by bin/agentvm (bash) and pool.nix (nix). Copy to config.json and adjust. Comments ('//' keys) are ignored.
//user: Guest login user; match your macOS username so virtiofs ownership lines up.
//uid: Your macOS uid (`id -u`); must match for sane virtiofs ownership.
//slots: Pool size, 1..9 (the slot digit completes the MAC address).
//storeOverlaySizeMB: Writable /nix/store overlay image per slot, MB (min 1024).
//stateDir: Per-slot state location: relative to your home, or an absolute path.
//subnetBase: Slot N lives on 192.168.(subnetBase+N).0/24; pick a range no other VPN/network uses (e.g. Docker Desktop claims 192.168.65.0/24 -- avoid base 64 if you run it).
//macPrefix: First 5.5 octets of the guest MACs (locally administered); the slot digit completes it.
//defaultProfile: Guest home profile used when auto-detection finds nothing (profiles/<name>/home.nix).
//vfkitPath: Host path to the vfkit binary (brew install vfkit).
//repoMountName: Basename the config repo copy is mounted under in the guest $HOME.
//forwardSshAgent: Forward your ssh-agent into guest sessions (git-over-ssh for private deps). While a session is attached, code in the guest can use your agent's keys -- leave off unless you need it.
//forwardGhToken: Send `gh auth token` into guest sessions as GH_TOKEN. The guest can act as you on GitHub -- leave off unless you need it.
//dockerMirrorPort: Host port of a pull-through Docker Hub mirror shared by all slots (null to disable).
//dockerPushPort: Host port of a push registry for locally built images (null to disable).
